title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim International Enterprises! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim International Enterprises:
Pilgrim International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim International Enterprises!
